name: opsagent-shopify-mcp
description: Full Shopify MCP server — Storefront API (catalog, cart, policies) + Admin API (products CRUD, files, orders, customers, themes, metafields). Multi-tenant.
long_description: MSApps-built MCP server that gives Claude complete access to any Shopify store. Public catalog ops (search, cart) work with no token; Storefront GraphQL ops need a Storefront token; Admin API ops (products CRUD, file management, orders, customers, themes, metafields) need an Admin API access token. Multi-tenant: every tool accepts a `shop` argument.

shopify_default_shop.title: Default shop
shopify_default_shop.description: Fallback shop domain when a tool call omits `shop`. Format: <handle>.myshopify.com.

shopify_storefront_token.title: Storefront API token
shopify_storefront_token.description: Storefront access token. Required for Storefront GraphQL tools (get_product, policies, collections).

shopify_admin_token.title: Admin API access token
shopify_admin_token.description: Admin API access token from Settings > Apps > Develop apps. Required for all shopify_admin_* tools.

shopify_api_version.title: API version
shopify_api_version.description: Shopify API version for both Storefront and Admin.

tools.name: shopify_search_products
tools.description: Search the public catalog (no token needed).

tools.name: shopify_admin_list_products
tools.description: List products with full admin details.

tools.name: shopify_admin_get_product
tools.description: Get product by GID (full admin data).

tools.name: shopify_admin_upload_files
tools.description: Upload files by URL to Shopify CDN.

tools.name: shopify_admin_list_themes
tools.description: List all themes on the store.
